description_long: This object consists of two simple, rectangular stools of different heights, both constructed from a light wood material. Each stool features four straight, square legs and a flat, unadorned seat, with the smaller stool able to nest partially beneath the larger one. The design is highly functional and minimal, with no visible decorative elements or embellishments. The wood grain is subtly visible, giving a natural and warm appearance. The stools are compact and lightweight, suitable for use in public spaces such as parks, bus stops, or urban plazas. Their clean lines and stackable form make them ideal for flexible seating arrangements in urban environments.
description: A pair of minimalist, light wood stools with flat seats and straight legs, designed for functional urban seating. The stools are stackable and feature a clean, natural finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing both stools side by side, with the smaller stool partially tucked under the larger one.
description_view_1: Side view of the larger stool, with the smaller stool mostly hidden behind it.
description_view_2: Rear view showing both stools, with the larger stool in front and the smaller stool offset to the right.
description_view_3: Side view of both stools aligned, with the smaller stool directly behind the larger one.
